ns0:entry.ns0:title: 521xueweihan/HelloGitHub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/521xueweihan/HelloGitHub
Language: python
分享 GitHub 上有趣、入门级的开源项目。Share interesting, entry-level open source projects on GitHub.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AstrBotDevs/AstrBot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AstrBotDevs/AstrBot
Language: python
AI Agent Assistant & development framework that integrates lots of IM platforms, LLMs, plugins and AI feature, and can be your openclaw alternative. ✨

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ComposioHQ/awesome-claude-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ComposioHQ/awesome-claude-skills
Language: python
A curated list of awesome Claude Skills, resources, and tools for customizing Claude AI workflows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: HKUDS/LightRAG
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HKUDS/LightRAG
Language: python
[EMNLP2025] "LightRAG: Simple and Fast Retrieval-Augmented Generation"

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LLMQuant/quant-mind
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LLMQuant/quant-mind
Language: python
QuantMind is an agent-native knowledge extraction and retrieval framework for quantitative finance.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/Model-Optimizer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/Model-Optimizer
Language: python
A unified library of SOTA model optimization techniques like quantization, distillation, pruning, neural architecture search, speculative decoding, etc. It compresses deep learning models for downstream deployment frameworks like TensorRT-LLM, TensorRT, vLLM, etc. to optimize inference speed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bojieli/ai-agent-book
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bojieli/ai-agent-book
Language: python
《深入理解 AI Agent：设计原理与工程实践》（李博杰 著）开源主仓库：全书正文、编译版 PDF 与按章配套代码

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bregman-arie/devops-exercises
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bregman-arie/devops-exercises
Language: python
Linux, Jenkins, AWS, SRE, Prometheus, Docker, Python, Ansible, Git, Kubernetes, Terraform, OpenStack, SQL, NoSQL, Azure, GCP, DNS, Elastic, Network, Virtualization. DevOps Interview Questions

ns0:entry.ns0:title: luongnv89/claude-howto
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/luongnv89/claude-howto
Language: python
A visual, example-driven guide to Claude Code — from basic concepts to advanced agents, with copy-paste templates that bring immediate value.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/SkillOpt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/SkillOpt
Language: python
SkillOpt is a text-space optimizer that trains reusable natural-language skills for frozen LLM agents through trajectory-driven edits, validation-gated updates, and deployable best_skill.md artifacts.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
Language: python
Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shiyu-coder/Kronos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shiyu-coder/Kronos
Language: python
Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tirth8205/code-review-graph
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tirth8205/code-review-graph
Language: python
Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unclecode/crawl4ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unclecode/crawl4ai
Language: python
🚀🤖 Crawl4AI: Open-source LLM Friendly Web Crawler & Scraper. Don't be shy, join here: https://discord.gg/jP8KfhDhyN

ns0:entry.ns0:title: virgiliojr94/book-to-skill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/virgiliojr94/book-to-skill
Language: python
Turn any technical book PDF into a Claude Code skill — ready to study, reference, and use while you work.
